title: lithocarpus tabularis
intro: Lithocarpus tabularis, also known as the Red Oak, is a species of tree native to eastern Asia, characterized by its broad leaves and distinctive red bark. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus tabularis are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, tannins, and phenolic acids, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus tabularis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
